articles.title: Visa proposes Ethereum auto-payment scheme
articles.description: Visa has proposed a blockchain account design that could allow Ethereum users to arrange auto-payments from a self-custodied wallet.

articles.title: Ban Crypto? Why Senate Banking Chief Suggests SEC And CFTC Should Do So
articles.description: Crypto is at the crosshair of a U.S. lawmaker – and it’s not surprising. Sen.
